series_metadata.series_description: OH931-SWA (State Workforce Agency) records associated with documentation maintained in accordance with Internal Revenue Service (IRS) Publication 1075 audit review requirements. Monthly audit documents include: secured container key audits, secured room entry swipe logs, secured room approved access logs, facility/room visitor logs, IRS Secure Data Transfer (SDT) Server/data use logs, IRS SDT server logs, and IRS-Treasury Offset Program (TOP) data logs. Records are located within office Office of Unemployment Insurance Operation OUIO in a secured area.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office ; when no longer required federal review, administrative or legal value department. ; Electronic: in office ; when no longer required federal review, administrative or legal value department
